nextToken.description: String for specifying the next set of paginated results.

source.description: A Source that contains information about a signing job's code image source.

key.description: Key name of the bucket object that contains your unsigned code.

version.description: Version of your source image in your version enabled S3 bucket.

signedObject.description: A SignedObject structure that contains information about a signing job's signed code image.

key.description: Key name that uniquely identifies a signed code image in your bucket.

signingMaterial.description: A SigningMaterial object that contains the Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the certificate used for the signing job.

certificateArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the certificates that is used to sign your code.

createdAt.description: The date and time that the signing job was created.

isRevoked.description: Indicates whether the signing job is revoked.

profileName.description: The name of the signing profile that created a signing job.

profileVersion.description: The version of the signing profile that created a signing job.

platformId.description: The unique identifier for a signing platform.

signatureExpiresAt.description: The time when the signature of a signing job expires.

jobOwner.description: The AWS account ID of the job owner.

jobInvoker.description: The AWS account ID of the job invoker.

platforms.description: A list of all platforms that match the request parameters.

nextToken.description: Value for specifying the next set of paginated results to return.

displayName.description: The display name of a signing platform.

partner.description: Any partner entities linked to a signing platform.

target.description: The types of targets that can be signed by a signing platform.

signingConfiguration.description: The configuration of a signing platform. This includes the designated hash algorithm and encryption algorithm of a signing platform.

encryptionAlgorithmOptions.description: The encryption algorithm options that are available for a code-signing job.

allowedValues.description: The set of accepted encryption algorithms that are allowed in a code-signing job.

defaultValue.description: The default encryption algorithm that is used by a code-signing job.

hashAlgorithmOptions.description: The hash algorithm options that are available for a code-signing job.

allowedValues.description: The set of accepted hash algorithms allowed in a code-signing job.

defaultValue.description: The default hash algorithm that is used in a code-signing job.

signingImageFormat.description: The image format of a AWS Signer platform or profile.

supportedFormats.description: The supported formats of a signing image.

defaultFormat.description: The default format of a signing image.

maxSizeInMB.description: The maximum size (in MB) of code that can be signed by a signing platform.

revocationSupported.description: Indicates whether revocation is supported for the platform.

profiles.description: A list of profiles that are available in the AWS account. This includes profiles with the status of CANCELED if the includeCanceled parameter is set to true.

nextToken.description: Value for specifying the next set of paginated results to return.

profileVersionArn.description: The ARN of a signing profile, including the profile version.

signingMaterial.description: The ACM certificate that is available for use by a signing profile.

certificateArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the certificates that is used to sign your code.

signatureValidityPeriod.description: The validity period for a signing job created using this signing profile.

value.description: The numerical value of the time unit for signature validity.

platformId.description: The ID of a platform that is available for use by a signing profile.

signingParameters.description: The parameters that are available for use by a Signer user.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the signing profile.

tags.description: A list of tags associated with the signing profile.

revisionId.description: A unique identifier for the current profile revision.

jobId.description: The ID of the signing job on output.

source.description: The object that contains the name of your S3 bucket or your raw code.

signingMaterial.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of your code signing certificate.

platformId.description: The microcontroller platform to which your signed code image will be distributed.

platformDisplayName.description: A human-readable name for the signing platform associated with the signing job.

profileName.description: The name of the profile that initiated the signing operation.

profileVersion.description: The version of the signing profile used to initiate the signing job.

overrides.description: A list of any overrides that were applied to the signing operation.

signingParameters.description: Map of user-assigned key-value pairs used during signing. These values contain any information that you specified for use in your signing job.

createdAt.description: Date and time that the signing job was created.

completedAt.description: Date and time that the signing job was completed.

signatureExpiresAt.description: Thr expiration timestamp for the signature generated by the signing job.

requestedBy.description: The IAM principal that requested the signing job.

statusReason.description: String value that contains the status reason.

revocationRecord.description: A revocation record if the signature generated by the signing job has been revoked. Contains a timestamp and the ID of the IAM entity that revoked the signature.

signedObject.description: Name of the S3 bucket where the signed code image is saved by AWS Signer.

jobOwner.description: The AWS account ID of the job owner.

jobInvoker.description: The IAM entity that initiated the signing job.

key.description: Key name of the bucket object that contains your unsigned code.

version.description: Version of your source image in your version enabled S3 bucket.

revokedEntities.description: A list of revoked entities (including zero or more of the signing profile ARN, signing job ARN, and certificate hashes) supplied as input to the API.

platformId.description: The ID of the target signing platform.

displayName.description: The display name of the target signing platform.

partner.description: A list of partner entities that use the target signing platform.

target.description: The validation template that is used by the target signing platform.

category.description: The category type of the target signing platform.

signingConfiguration.description: A list of configurations applied to the target platform at signing.

signingImageFormat.description: The format of the target platform's signing image.

maxSizeInMB.description: The maximum size (in MB) of the payload that can be signed by the target platform.

revocationSupported.description: A flag indicating whether signatures generated for the signing platform can be revoked.

encryptionAlgorithmOptions.description: The encryption algorithm options that are available for a code-signing job.

allowedValues.description: The set of accepted encryption algorithms that are allowed in a code-signing job.

defaultValue.description: The default encryption algorithm that is used by a code-signing job.

hashAlgorithmOptions.description: The hash algorithm options that are available for a code-signing job.

allowedValues.description: The set of accepted hash algorithms allowed in a code-signing job.

defaultValue.description: The default hash algorithm that is used in a code-signing job.

profileName.description: The name of the target signing profile.

profileVersion.description: The current version of the signing profile.

profileVersionArn.description: The signing profile ARN, including the profile version.

signingMaterial.description: The ARN of the certificate that the target profile uses for signing operations.

platformId.description: The ID of the platform that is used by the target signing profile.

platformDisplayName.description: A human-readable name for the signing platform associated with the signing profile.

signatureValidityPeriod.description: The validity period for a signing job.

overrides.description: A list of overrides applied by the target signing profile for signing operations.

signingParameters.description: A map of key-value pairs for signing operations that is attached to the target signing profile.

status.description: The status of the target signing profile.

statusReason.description: Reason for the status of the target signing profile.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the signing profile.

tags.description: A list of tags associated with the signing profile.

revokedAt.description: The time when the signing profile was revoked.

revisionId.description: The identifier for the current revision of profile permissions.

policySizeBytes.description: Total size of the policy associated with the Signing Profile in bytes.

permissions.description: List of permissions associated with the Signing Profile.

nextToken.description: String for specifying the next set of paginated results.

action.description: An AWS Signer action permitted as part of cross-account permissions.

principal.description: The AWS principal that has been granted a cross-account permission.

statementId.description: A unique identifier for a cross-account permission statement.

profileVersion.description: The signing profile version that a permission applies to.

tags.description: A list of tags associated with the signing profile.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the signing profile created.

profileVersion.description: The version of the signing profile being created.

revisionId.description: An identifier for the current revision of the profile permissions.

metadata.description: Information including the signing profile ARN and the signing job ID.
